title: mimulus tenellus var. procerus
intro: Mimulus tenellus var. procerus, also known as the small yellow monkey flower, is a plant species that belongs to the family Phrymaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mimulus tenellus var. procerus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. The herbal preparations of this plant often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
